system.description:
Humbled. Your character has felt the touch of the divine and trembled. She feels unworthy and wretched. For as long as the Condition lasts, she suffers a -2 die penalty to Resolve rolls and may not regain Willpower from her Requiem.

Possible Sources: Dramatic failure on a Theban Sorcery ritual.

Resolution: The character regains Willpower using her Mask.

Beat: n/a
